---
title: "Calculus II Project"
authors: "Tilghman Clark, Elliot Fox-Deel and Wesley Stone"
format: html
editor: visual
---

```{r}
# You might have to install this (install.packages("tidyverse")) at first, it has a ton of stuff and is really generally useful
library(tidyverse)
```

```{r}
fx <- function(x) -(x-2)^2+4
gx <- function(x) {}
hxy <- function(x,y) {}
```

```{r}
integrate(fx,0,4)
```
